parsed.production_notes: The video uses a mixed production style, combining a human actor with an AI-generated avatar. The top character is a 3D render with flawless, stylized features, unnatural perfect lighting, and slightly stiff lip-sync typical of AI avatars. The bottom half is standard human-recorded footage with natural lighting and practical background elements.

characters.appearance: Young female with a stylized 3D-animated appearance. She has a smooth brown complexion, large brown eyes, and long, thick, wavy black hair parted in the middle.
characters.wardrobe: Bright solid blue blazer over a lighter blue top.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a medium build. He has brown skin, short dark hair, a light beard and mustache, and wears dark-rimmed glasses.

scenes.setting: Abstract digital background (top) and indoor clinic/office (bottom)

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized, 3D-animated female character is framed from the chest up, facing directly forward. She has a smooth, flawless brown complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and long, thick, wavy black hair parted in the middle. She wears a bright, solid blue blazer over a lighter blue top. The background behind her is a soft, abstract gradient of purple and blue with subtle geometric shapes. The lighting is even and artificial, typical of a 3D render, highlighting her features without harsh shadows. She maintains a cheerful, engaging expression throughout.

A young human male is framed from the chest up, sitting indoors and facing the camera. He has brown skin, short dark hair, a light beard, and wears dark-rimmed glasses. He is dressed in a dark grey polo shirt. The background is a brightly lit room, possibly a clinic or office, featuring a white wall with electrical switches, a water dispenser with paper cups, and some dark equipment or bags to the right. The lighting is practical and slightly uneven, typical of an indoor webcam recording. He uses hand gestures while speaking and displays a slightly concerned or inquisitive expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a horizontal split-screen. The top half features a 3D animated female avatar against a purple and blue gradient background. The bottom half shows a real human male sitting in what appears to be a clinic or office, with a water dispenser and medical equipment visible behind him. Throughout the scene, various text captions and graphics appear over the video, including a clock, a '30 DAYS' graphic, screenshots of an app interface, and a '50 LAKHS' graphic. The two characters appear to be having a conversation, with the human expressing concern and the avatar responding cheerfully.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ಐ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. ನಾಳೆ ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂ ಹ್ಯಾವಿಂಗ್. [I need to learn English. I have an interview tomorrow.]

Character A says: Do you want to learn English speaking? [Do you want to learn English speaking?]

Character B says: ಹೌದು. ನೀನು ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದಾ? [Yes. Can you speak in Kannada?]

Character A says: ಖಂಡಿತ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. ನಿನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಅಂತ ಇದಿಯಾ? [Certainly I will speak. Do you want to learn English?]

Character B says: ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಇಷ್ಟ ಇದೆ. ಬಟ್ ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಕು? ನಮ್ಮ ಹತ್ರ ದುಡ್ಡು, ಟೈಮ್ ಎರಡೂ ಇಲ್ಲ. [I want to learn English. But what to do? I don't have money or time.]

Character A says: MySivi ಆಪ್ ನ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡು. ದಿನಾ ನನ್ ಜೊತೆಗೆ ೧೫ ರಿಂದ ೨೦ ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ, ವಿತಿನ್ ೩೦ ಡೇಸ್ ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ. [Try the MySivi app. If you practice with me for 15 to 20 minutes daily, within 30 days you will speak English very well.]

Character B says: ಹಾ. ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಟೀಚರ್ ಯಾರು ಇರ್ತಾರೆ? [Yes. Who will be the teacher in this?]

Character A says: ನನ್ ಅಂತಹ AI teachers ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಬೈ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ. ನೀನು ಮಾಡೋ ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನು ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ನಿನ್ನನ್ನು ಜಡ್ಜ್ ಕೂಡ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ. [AI teachers like me will teach English step-by-step. They will correct the mistakes you make. They won't even judge you.]

Character B says: ಹಾಗಿದ್ರೆ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡ್ಬಿಟ್ಟು ನೋಡ್ತೀನಿ. [In that case, I will try it and see.]

Character A says: ಇವತ್ತೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್‌ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ಕೊಳ್ಳಿ. ೫೦ ಲಕ್ಷಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಜನ ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಬರಿ ೧ ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ನ ಇವಾಗ್ಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಿ. [Download the MySivi app today. More than 50 lakh people are learning English by practicing on this. Start your trial right now for just 1 rupee. Speak English excellently.]
scenes.on_screen_text: ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು (Learn English) ನಾಳೆ (Tomorrow) ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂ ಹ್ಯಾವಿಂಗ್ (Interview having) learn English Speaking ಹೌದು (Yes) ನೀನು (You) ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದಾ (Can speak in Kannada) ಖಂಡಿತ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀನಿ (Certainly I will speak) ನಿನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ (You English) ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಅಂತ ಇದಿಯಾ (Want to learn) ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ (I English) ಕಲಿಬೇಕು ಇಷ್ಟ (Want to learn) ಇದೆ (Is) ಬಟ್ ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಕು (But what to do) ನಮ್ಮ ಹತ್ರ ದುಡ್ಡು (We have money) ಟೈಮ್ ಎರಡೂ ಇಲ್ಲ (Time both no) MySivi ದಿನಾ ನನ್ ಜೊತೆಗೆ (Daily with me) 15-20 mins ೧೫ ರಿಂದ ೨೦ ನಿಮಿಷ (15 to 20 minutes) ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ (If practiced) 30 DAYS ವಿತಿನ್ ೩೦ ಡೇಸ್ (Within 30 days) ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ (Very well) ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ (Will speak English) ಹಾ (Yes) ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ಟೀಚರ್ (In this teacher) ಯಾರು ಇರ್ತಾರೆ (Who will be) ನನ್ ಅಂತಹ AI teacher (AI teacher like me) ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ ಬೈ ಸ್ಟೆಪ್ (Step by step) ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಸ್ತಾರೆ (Will teach English) ನೀನು ಮಾಡೋ ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನು (Mistakes you make) ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ (Will correct) ನಿನ್ನನ್ನು ಜಡ್ಜ್ (You judge) ಕೂಡ ಮಾಡಲ್ಲ ಹಾಗಿದ್ರೆ (Also won't do in that case) ಇವತ್ತೇ MySivi (Today itself MySivi) MySivi AI English Spe... Installing... 50 LAKHS ಐವತ್ತು ಲಕ್ಷ ಕ್ಕಿಂತ (More than 50 lakhs) ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಜನ ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ (More people in this) ಬರಿ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಗೆ (For just 1 rupee) ನಿಮ್ಮ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ (Your trial) ನ ಇವಾಗಲೇ ಶುರು (Start right now) ಮಾಡಿ ಸಕ್ಕತ್ತಾಗಿ (Do excellently) ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡಿ (Speak English)

panels.panel_visual_description: A modern smartphone is displayed at a slight angle, floating against a solid, light purple background. The phone has a dark, metallic outer rim, visible side buttons, and a completely blank white screen. The lighting is soft and even, creating a clean, minimalist product shot. There are no characters or other props in the frame.

scenes.visual_description: A 3D render of a modern smartphone is shown at a slight angle against a solid light purple background. The screen of the phone displays the MySivi app logo, the text 'English speaking app', and a purple 'Install Now' button. The phone has a dark metallic edge and visible side buttons.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Click on install now and download MySivi app. [Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
scenes.on_screen_text: MySivi English speaking app Install Now
